name: Content Factory - Manual Poyo LoFi Hip Hop Shorts (AI)

assignments.name: prompt_visual
assignments.value: Cozy late-night city for lo-fi hip hop: soft teal and purple neon, rainy window reflections, bedroom studio corner with sampler and vinyl, slow horizontal drift, tape warmth, chillhop mood, cinematic vertical composition

assignments.name: tags
assignments.value: lofi hip hop, chillhop, study beats, vertical, shorts, cozy, neon night

nodes.name: Set LoFi Hip Hop Inputs
nodes.notes: Edit prompt_visual / track_for_metadata. seedance_model: set here (Code node cannot use $env on locked-down n8n). To drive from env: switch this field to Expression = {{ $env.POYO_SEEDANCE_MODEL || 'seedance-2-fast' }}

nodes.name: Build Poyo LoFi Shorts Payload
nodes.notes: Does not use $env (blocked in Code sandbox). Model comes from Set → seedance_model.

nodes.name: POST generate-poyo-shorts-only
nodes.notes: Poyo + нарезка + загрузка шортов на YouTube. Generation может занять много минут — timeout увеличен.
